title: [release-1.4] Don't expect the config blob to be listed in (skopeo inspect)
body: This a backport of https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1572 to fix CI on this branch.

comments.body: Doc nits for consideration, ditto 1.13 variant.  LGTM otherwise and I'd be fine with the docs as is.
These PRs are supposed to be backports — I’ll prepare fixes on the main branch, and add them to these PRs.

> These PRs are supposed to be backports — I’ll prepare fixes on the main branch,

https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1576 .
